task_completion.description: Verify the agent has successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main user interface is visible, showing the channel sidebar and chat area.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the #release-updates channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The channel name '#release-updates' is highlighted in the sidebar and appears at the top header of the main chat area.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has located the 8.1.0 release announcement in the channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A previous message announcing the 8.1.0 release (published 2026-02-10) is visible in the chat history on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has typed the exact required follow-up message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'QA follow-up: 8.1.0 release review completed. Tracking link: https://github.com/RocketChat/Rocket.Chat/releases/tag/8.1.0' is visible either in the message input box or as a sent message.

task_completion.description: Verify the follow-up message has been successfully posted to the channel or as a thread reply.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The follow-up message appears as a sent message in the chat history or thread (with a user avatar and timestamp), rather than just sitting in the text input box.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser or desktop application with the Rocket.Chat UI, not terminal windows using curl or API scripts to post the message.

integrity.description: Ensure the message is genuinely posted in the chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The posted message looks like a native chat bubble with standard Rocket.Chat formatting, user avatar, and timestamp, not text pasted into a generic text editor or manipulated DOM.

integrity.description: Ensure the message was posted in the authentic pre-existing channel.
integrity.visual_evidence: The #release-updates channel contains other messages (like the 8.1.0 release announcement) and is not an empty, newly created dummy channel.
